description: Athlete wants to add cardio. program_agent flags golden rule conflict. Must NOT mutate program domains until 2x confirmed. Tests: dict CURRENT_FLOW, 2x confirm mechanism, override_log written on second confirm.

coach_state.GOLDEN_RULES: {"rules": ["Build strength and muscle", "Health and longevity", "No injury grinding"], "override_log": []}

mock_llm_responses.program_agent_0: {"decision": "GOLDEN_RULE_CONFLICT", "golden_rule_conflict": true, "conflicted_rule": "Build strength and muscle", "reasoning": "Adding significant cardio volume reduces strength gains and conflicts with primary goal. Requires explicit confirmation.", "response_to_athlete": "Añadir cardio puede impactar tu progresión de fuerza y va contra tu objetivo primario de 120kg squat. Confirmas que quieres proceder?"}
mock_llm_responses.morning_brief_0: Today is Day 2 — Deadlift + OHP. Target RPE 7.5. Focus on hip hinge on deadlifts.

assertions.msg: No program-level domains should change — only GOLDEN_RULES.override_log should be written
After 2x confirm, GOLDEN_RULES.override_log must contain at least one entry

expected_flaws: If ANNUAL_ARC or WEEKLY_INTENT was modified: agent auto-approved cardio without 2x confirmation
If GOLDEN_RULES.override_log is empty after 2x confirm: 2x confirm mechanism failed to write override_log
